perception_lane_candidate_evidence: NON_FINAL_CANDIDATE_ONLY: degraded energy-margin read before the warning with no sufficient integrated correction.
objective_goal_lane_candidate_evidence: NON_FINAL_CANDIDATE_ONLY: continuation of the approach in icing/final-configuration context despite adverse margin.
action_lane_candidate_evidence: NON_FINAL_CANDIDATE_ONLY: no single fully discrete pre-warning action error is explicit, so the action lane is weaker than perception.
precondition_context_evidence: icing cue, ref-speed logic, autopilot/trim/final-configuration context.
evidence_supporting: FDR-derived low-speed interval; no interruption of adverse trend before warning; supports earliest boundary.
evidence_against: No live verbal low-speed callout; reconstruction risk; discrete actor anchor weaker than CAND-B.
limitations: window partly reconstructed and vulnerable to precondition drift.

perception_lane_candidate_evidence: NON_FINAL_CANDIDATE_ONLY: perception lane exists but is secondary to the explicit control response.
objective_goal_lane_candidate_evidence: NON_FINAL_CANDIDATE_ONLY: goal lane remains continuation/recovery oriented but is less decisive than action.
action_lane_candidate_evidence: NON_FINAL_CANDIDATE_ONLY: captain aft-column response after stick shaker is the clearest explicit action lane in the sequence.
precondition_context_evidence: warning onset, autopilot disconnect, upset onset context.
evidence_supporting: explicit factual timing and clearest direct actor anchor.
evidence_against: possible downstream-of-escape boundary; high post-escape-hunting risk.
limitations: late anchor may describe the critical act without capturing first departure.

perception_lane_candidate_evidence: NON_FINAL_CANDIDATE_ONLY: integrated speed/icing awareness demand before warning is the main perception lane.
objective_goal_lane_candidate_evidence: NON_FINAL_CANDIDATE_ONLY: continuation of approach under icing/ref-speed burden is relevant but broad.
action_lane_candidate_evidence: NON_FINAL_CANDIDATE_ONLY: action lane is diffuse and therefore weak as a clean anchor.
evidence_supporting: explains why the dispute starts before warning and why PF/PM interpretation matters.
evidence_against: timing is broad; agent migration risk high; may sit closer to context than active failure.
limitations: not discrete enough to settle escape point on its own.
